name: agentic-factory
description: Database-backed agentic software factory operations with structured events, baton state, reviews, verification history, pause/resume controls, and markdown ledger rendering.

interface.shortDescription: Run durable agentic factories with SQLite-backed ledgers.
interface.longDescription: Agentic Factory adds executable infrastructure and public orchestration guidance for long-running agent-driven software builds. Its primary mode is Codex app orchestration with durable SQLite state, baton assignment and handoff commands, review and verification records, pause/resume checkpoints, doctor checks, markdown ledger rendering, agent packet generation, and explicit runtime-mode guidance for portable agent CLI approximations. It ships separate skills for CLI/state operations and orchestration, so it works without private skill dependencies.
defaultPrompt: Run a Codex-native DB-backed software factory for this project
Generate a Builder agent packet for this baton
Record this baton handoff in the factory DB
